source_path: 7. Contact360 deployment/7.10 — Deployment overflow patch buffer inside era 7.md
title: Version 7.10
codename: Deployment overflow patch buffer inside era 7
summary: `7.10.x` is not a new analytics stage. It is a controlled overflow patch lane for deferred or late-discovered deployment/governance fixes that do not alter 8.0 scope boundaries.
